global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on the brand and call to action.
global.main_message: The ad promotes a financial tracking service with an emphasis on quick signup.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo positioned at the top, featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: The main text reads 'Track every euro' in bold, clear typography, centrally placed for emphasis.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that states 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape that appears in the center, possibly representing a card or interface element.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape positioned centrally, complementing the overall design without specific identification.

elements.label: Secondary decorative element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape that adds visual interest, located near the main text.

elements.label: Bottom text message
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad reiterating the main message, enhancing the call to action.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Secondary CTA
elements.description: A smaller call to action button with the text 'Book now', positioned at the bottom right.

elements.label: Top headline
elements.description: A brief headline at the top left corner, reinforcing the brand identity.
